allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix invoice parsing and add GitHub Pages deployment

- Fix ELECTRICA consumption extraction for single/multi NLC invoices
- Skip first page \(summary\) for multi-NLC to avoid wrong kWh totals
- Include continuation pages for tables spanning multiple pages
- Improve PPC location, address, and consumption period extraction
- Set sourceLine to "Energie activă" matching Specificație column
- Add base path and GitHub Actions workflow for GitHub Pages

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix GitHub Pages routing and local dev base path

Set BrowserRouter basename from Vite BASE_URL and only apply
/InvoiceReport/ base path in production builds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
